title: Fair Milk Pricing for Farmers Act
short_title: Fair Milk Pricing for Farmers Act
stage_label: Referred to the Subcommittee on General Farm Commodities, Risk Management, and Credit.
crs_summary: Fair Milk Pricing for Farmers Act This bill requires manufacturers to report production cost and product yield information for all dairy products processed in the same facility or facilities to the Department of Agriculture (USDA) Dairy Product Mandatory Reporting Program. Further, USDA must publish a report containing the information obtained under these new requirements and publish a report every two years thereafter. As background, under the Dairy Product Mandatory Reporting Program, USDA must collect certain dairy product sales information from manufacturers and release the data on a weekly basis.
last_action_text: Referred to the Subcommittee on General Farm Commodities, Risk Management, and Credit.
